results.rendered_html:
atigam 1 P.
1 To pass, elapse, pass away (as time); daśāhe'tigate
(pb)  Rām. 
2 To overcome, exceed, excel, See atiga.
3 To pass over, pass by, neglect.
4 To pass away, die.
5 To escape.
